mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into attachment (filename, filealias, `type`, fileurl, filepath, filesize, `status`, createtime, updatetime ) values (#{filename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filealias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filesize,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update attachment set filename = #{filename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, filealias = #{filealias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fileurl = #{fileurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, filepath = #{filepath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, filesize = #{filesize,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createtime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updatetime = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, filename, filealias, `type`, fileurl, filepath, filesize, `status`, createtime, updatetime from attachment where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
select id, filename, filealias, `type`, fileurl, filepath, filesize, `status`, createtime, updatetime from attachment

select id, filename, filealias, `type`, fileurl, filepath, filesize, `status`, createtime, updatetime from attachment where id in
#{id}
